args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop';$ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue';$root=(Get-Location).Path;$sln=Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Filter '*.sln' -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1;$csproj=Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Filter '*.csproj' -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1;$fsproj=Get-ChildItem -Path $root -Filter '*.fsproj' -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1;if($sln){& csharp-ls --loglevel error --solution $sln.FullName}elseif($csproj -or $fsproj){& csharp-ls --loglevel error}else{$dummyDir=[IO.Path]::Combine($env:LOCALAPPDATA,'EnriLSP','workspaces','csharp-empty');New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dummyDir | Out-Null;$dummySln=[IO.Path]::Combine($dummyDir,'Empty.sln');if(-not (Test-Path $dummySln)){Set-Content -Path $dummySln -Value @('Microsoft Visual Studio Solution File, Format Version 12.00','# Visual Studio Version 17','VisualStudioVersion = 17.0.31903.59','MinimumVisualStudioVersion = 10.0.40219.1','Global','EndGlobal') -Encoding Ascii};& csharp-ls --loglevel error --solution $dummySln}
